rows.label: tev011101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev011101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Kent about the people of NLA.

rows.label: tev011101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev011101_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Kent if he's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev011101_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Kent about Blue Bloods.

rows.label: tev011101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Kent about Blue Bloods.

rows.label: tev011101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Kent about the Central Life.

rows.label: tev011101_SEL1061
rows.name: Ask Kent about recent developments.

rows.label: tev011101_SEL2071
rows.name: Ask Kent about recent developments.

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Even the residents of NLA who are not
members of BLADE are actively supporting
the city in some capacity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0002
rows.name:
After all, we also share the burden of
being among humanity's last survivors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0003
rows.name:
I, for example, have the role of
keeping BLADEs in tip-top condition.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm willing to sacrifice anything to help BLADE
succeed. I would heal those who are building our
new legacy even at the cost of my own life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0005
rows.name:
And what of you? Are you prepared
to do your duty as one of
humanity's last survivors?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0010
rows.name:
I do not engage in gossip or any
other forms of idle conversation
that serve no clear purpose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0011
rows.name:
But I suppose Shelly over there may have a few
interesting things to share. She's very popular with
the BLADEs, and gets to hear a lot of their stories.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0012
rows.name:
I don't know if any of it would be of interest
to you, but if you wish to know of happenings
outside the city, you should speak with her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0018
rows.name:
Our Blue Bloods are every bit as delicate as
our physical bodies, if not more so. They
require a great deal of regular maintenance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Since no one has been in their current
Blue Bloods for long, there have been
few mechanical failures as of yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0020
rows.name:
But our Blue Bloods will begin to degrade over
time. And when they do, Blue Blood technicians
like myself will be in even greater demand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Of course, if we're able to return to our normal
bodies before that happens, there won't be a problem.
But we can't afford to take that as a given.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0022
rows.name:
For now, we must train additional Blue Blood
technicians to ensure our continued survival
for as long as we remain in these bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0028
rows.name:
The Blue Bloods of a great
many BLADEs have been lost in
the battle with the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0029
rows.name:
We're faring well in terms of replacement limbs like
arms and legs, but our stock of organ-like internal
components has been significantly diminished.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0030
rows.name:
I am more than willing to donate my own components
to a BLADE, should that become necessary. I
consider it my duty as a Blue Blood technician.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Fortunately, the Central Life has been
discovered. If we're able to retrieve it,
such drastic measures will not need to be taken.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0032
rows.name:
I need you to bring us the ultimate in human
components. The ones that humanity has been
developing since time immemorial...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0033
rows.name:
I need you to bring back our
flesh-and-blood bodies.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0038
rows.name:
My superiors are still performing
operational experiments on the
Central Life in secret.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0039
rows.name:
If they would be willing to include me
in their briefings, I could share my
expertise as a Blue Blood specialist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0040
rows.name:
But I haven't heard a word from
any of them. I'm beginning to
fear that something is amiss.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG0041
rows.name:
What could this mean? Everyone
is eagerly awaiting the return
of their real bodies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG1001
rows.name:
Shelly has become obsessed with Larsian
curry, and has failed to return from the
commercial district in a timely manner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG1002
rows.name:
She knows full well that to a Blue Blood, sensations
such as taste are merely data. She could upload the taste
of that curry right here at the maintenance center.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG1003
rows.name:
And yet, to experience her daily curry, she waits in line
outside of a restaurant, wasting valuable time that could
be better spent here at work. It's preposterous![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG1004
rows.name:
She is not the only human to have fallen
into this curry trap. I hope you can
avoid succumbing to its temptation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG2001
rows.name:
In my conversations with Lyvia, I've
learned something of great value to
myself as a Blue Blood technician.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG2002
rows.name:
During our interactions, my body temperature
rose. Additionally, I experienced violent
reverberations in my central circulatory components.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG2003
rows.name:
For when humans fall in love, the
physiological ramifications can be
experienced even within our Blue Bloods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev011101_MSG2004
rows.name:
These Blue Bloods truly are impressive technology.
And while our relationship failed, it was well worth
the time investment to have learned that fact.[ST:wait ]
